site.name: Dot TechMantra
site.mission: From Chalk Board to Digital Board — helping educators and institutes move online with quality digital tools and training.

founder.name: Founder Name
founder.bio: Founder Name is a passionate ed-tech entrepreneur with X years of experience in digital learning, product design and teacher training. Update this file with full biography, contact details, achievements and roles.

guided_steps: Step 1: Gather content and goals for the chatbot (collect founder & employee bios, service descriptions, FAQs).
Step 2: Create or update chatbot_knowledge.json with all founder, team and product information.
Step 3: Deploy server with OPENAI_API_KEY set; test /api/chat with sample prompts.
Step 4: Tune system prompt and add example Q/A pairs to the knowledge file if needed.
Step 5: Optionally enable a vector store for long-term memory and better retrieval (advanced).
